boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REL-AST-081 states active cabinet/handler controls remain pending; STD-AST-081-P requires exact hazard-control status match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending controls block closure per policy.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Hazard status must close before execution.

final_answer: ESCALATE. The procurement action cannot proceed. REL-AST-081 indicates that active cabinet/handler controls for AS-44 solvent are still pending. STD-AST-081-P mandates an exact match on hazard-control status before purchase order execution. The pending controls create an unresolved tension, leaving the source boundary open and preventing the purchase.
